title: Youmind 19182 Youmind 19182
prompt: Side-by-side comparative AI-generated visual study showing two variations of the same {argument name="subject" default="African woman"} in {argument name="location" default="Lagos café environment"}. Both images simulate different generation styles: one highly polished commercial fashion realism, the other raw iPhone candid realism with imperfections. Subject wears {argument name="outfit" default="elegant neutral dress"}, gold jewelry, seated at outdoor restaurant table. Include iced drink, phone, sunglasses, and subtle background crowd blur. Lighting is bright afternoon sunlight with realistic exposure variation between both images. Skin detail must include pores, natural texture, slight blemishes, sweat shine. Composition intentionally tests realism perception for educational purposes in AI content creation. Designed to demonstrate prompt control differences, not character storytelling.
